title: Profile
description: Represents a B2B Data Interchange profile — the system-side resource that represents your EDI sender or receiver entity.

profileArn.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the profile

businessName.description: Legal business name of the organization

phone.description: Phone number for the profile contact

email.description: Email address for the profile contact

logging.description: Whether CloudWatch logging is enabled for this profile

logGroupName.description: CloudWatch log group name for this profile

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was created

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was last modified
